name: Use of Low-Level Functionality
description: The product uses low-level functionality that is explicitly prohibited by the framework or specification under which the product operates. This can violate specifications, disable built-in protections, create exploitable inconsistencies, or expose raw functionality to attack.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node invokes low-level system calls or prohibited API functions (e.g., JNI, raw sockets, direct thread management) bypassing the STRUCTURAL[framework] protections, without CONTROL[framework_compliance] enforcement
